positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial forest scene. Central composition featuring silhouetted, stylized mountains and towering fantasy flora (e.g., bioluminescent ferns, crescent moon vines). The aesthetic should blend Art Nouveau organic curves with mid-century modern geometric symmetry. Use a highly restricted color palette: deep indigo, burnt orange, cream, and matte black accents. The linework must be clean and bold, creating strong, graphic silhouettes against a slight gradient wash. Print-friendly vector art look, high contrast, intricate yet easily reproducible pattern, designed for direct textile printing.
negative: low detail, artifacts, noisy, blur, text, watermark, logo, trademark, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, out of frame, messy, photorealistic, cartoon, abstract
